Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_SPRING

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_SPRING: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_spring#Discussion)

The effect represents a spring force effect.
